title: Inmis InventoryManagement Compat
description: Compatibility layer between Inmis backpacks and Inventory Management mods.
body:
# Inmis + Inventory Management Compatibility mod

**Adds Inventory Management buttons to Inmis backpacks!**

This lightweight compatibility mod enables the Sort, Transfer All, and Auto Stack buttons from [Inventory Management](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-management) to work seamlessly with [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis) backpacks.

![How it looks like in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/955e2a42c953c14c57275e7613747ddc7cd7591b.png)

---

## Requirements

**Required:**
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis)
- [Inventory Management](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-management)


---

## FAQ

**Q: Do I need this on the server?**  
A: No! This is a client-side mod that works on any server.

**Q: Will this work with modded backpacks?**  
A: This mod specifically adds compatibility between Inmis and Inventory Management. Other backpack mods would need their own compatibility patches.

---
